title: NewEconomy
description: A simple and functional economy system for Minecraft Paper servers with full compatibility with Vault API.
body:
# **NewEconomy**

A **complete, modern, and highly configurable economy plugin** for Minecraft **Paper 1.21+** servers, built with performance, scalability, and integration in mind.
Fully compatible with the **Vault API** and featuring **native Discord integration** for cross-platform economy management.

---

## 🔗 Discord Integration

Seamlessly connect your Minecraft economy with Discord.

* `/discord link` — Generate a secure code to link your Discord account
* `/discord unlink` — Unlink your Discord account
* **Discord Bot Command:** `/pay @User <amount>` — Send money directly from Discord
* **Automatic Sync:** Payments and balances are always linked to the player’s Minecraft account
* **Auto-link Authentication:** Fast and secure account linking through the Discord bot

---

## ✨ Features

### 💰 Base Economy System

* Full **Vault API** compatibility
* Clean and modern visual messages with colors and formatting
* Fully localized commands and messages
* Granular and permission-based access control
* JSON data storage with **asynchronous saving**
* Custom events for easy integration with other plugins
* Built-in **Discord account linking system**

---

### 🚀 Advanced Economy Systems

* 🏦 Bank system with configurable daily interest
* 💳 Loan system with installments and limits
* 🎁 Daily rewards with streak bonuses
* 🏆 Achievement system with configurable prizes
* 📊 Complete transaction history
* 🤝 Player-to-player payment requests
* 💬 **Discord Payments:** send money using `/pay @User` directly from Discord
* 🔄 Automatic sync between Discord and Minecraft accounts

---

## 📋 Requirements

* **Minecraft:** 1.21+
* **Server Software:** Paper (recommended)
* **Java:** 21+
* **Dependencies:** Vault (optional, for integration)
* **Discord Bot:** Optional (required for Discord payments and account linking)

---

## 🧾 Commands

### 🔹 Basic Commands

* `/saldo` — View your balance
* `/saldo <player>` — View another player's balance
* `/pagar <player> <amount>` — Send money
* `/economia` — Main help menu
* `/economia top` — Richest players ranking
* `/economia stats` — Server economy statistics

---

### 🏦 Banking System

* `/banco` — Bank menu
* `/banco depositar <amount>` — Deposit money
* `/banco sacar <amount>` — Withdraw money
* `/banco saldo` — View bank balance
* `/banco info` — View interest details

---

### 💳 Loan System

* `/emprestimo` — Loan menu
* `/emprestimo pegar <amount>` — Request a loan
* `/emprestimo pagar <amount>` — Pay an installment
* `/emprestimo info` — View loan details

---

### 🎁 Rewards & Achievements

* `/diario` — Claim daily reward
* `/conquistas` — View achievements

---

### 📜 History & Requests

* `/historico [page]` — View transaction history
* `/solicitar <player> <amount> [reason]` — Request a payment
* `/solicitar aceitar <player>` — Accept a request
* `/solicitar recusar <player>` — Decline a request

---

### 🛠 Administrative Commands

* `/ecoadmin give <player> <amount>` — Give money
* `/ecoadmin remove <player> <amount>` — Remove money
* `/ecoadmin set <player> <amount>` — Set balance
* `/ecoadmin reset <player>` — Reset player account
* `/ecoadmin reload` — Reload configuration

---

## 🔐 Permissions

### Basic

* `neweconomy.use` — Use basic commands
* `neweconomy.balance` — View own balance
* `neweconomy.balance.others` — View others' balance
* `neweconomy.pay` — Send money

### Systems

* `neweconomy.bank` — Bank access
* `neweconomy.loan` — Loan access
* `neweconomy.daily` — Daily rewards
* `neweconomy.achievements` — Achievements
* `neweconomy.history` — Transaction history
* `neweconomy.request` — Payment requests
* `neweconomy.discord` — Discord account linking
* `neweconomy.discord.pay` — Discord payment commands

### Admin

* `neweconomy.admin` — Administrative access
* `neweconomy.*` — Full access

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

The `config.yml` allows full customization:

### Base Settings

* Currency name and symbol
* Starting balance
* Transfer limits
* Optional transaction fees
* Auto-save interval

### Optional Systems

* Enable or disable each feature
* Bank interest rates
* Loan limits and rules
* Daily reward values
* Achievements and rewards
* Payment request expiration

### Discord Integration

* Bot token
* Command prefix
* Auto-link options
* Mention payment behavior
* Sync mode between Discord and Minecraft

### Messages

* Fully customizable messages
* Minecraft color codes supported
* Dynamic placeholders

---
